title: athyrium distentifolium
intro: Athyrium distentifolium, also known as the lady fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Athyrium distentifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health problems.
